message:
chore(beads): refresh codex hook coverage epic + close completed sub-tasks

Re-export of .beads/issues.jsonl after working through the codex
hook coverage epic. Beads were updated, statuses moved, and a
handful of new sub-tasks created during planning, so the JSONL
canonical export had drifted from the SQLite database.

Net delta: 32 issue lines added, 24 modified/removed in place.
The new lines cover:

- P1.x sub-tasks for unit-level coverage of the new HookProtocol::
  Codex output paths (output_denial / output_warning, generic-Write
  refactor, detect_protocol negative-space tests).
- P2 subprocess integration coverage epic.
- P4.x install/uninstall correctness sub-tasks (stale
  CODEX_STATUS=unsupported asserts in agent_config_test.bats,
  unconfigure_codex bats coverage, install/uninstall round-trip
  idempotence).

The replaced lines are existing sub-task entries whose status,
close_reason, or description was updated when the corresponding
work landed (commit c746fe1: feat(codex)). Treating the beads/
JSONL as a snapshot of the source of truth — committing now so the
issue history matches the codex feature commit it tracks.

No source-code change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
